case_title: MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. VS. SONIA L SPISZ et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. HEARING SET FOR FEB-28-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-28-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SPISZ, SONIA L $8,281.22 PRINCIPAL, $726.22 INTEREST, $189.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,197.04, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT BY COURT"
